notes: Scrabble is a turn-based word-construction puzzle game with no narrative world-state, danger/safety systems, faction mechanics, or political situations. The game communicates game-state through abstract UI elements (tile placement, score tracking, word validation) rather than environmental or visual narrative manifestations. No enemy faction systems, danger indicators, or world-state visual feedback exist. The Wikipedia source provides only release history and licensing information with no mechanical or visual communication details.
